# LLM Wiki

本目录是一个本地 Markdown LLM Wiki，采用 Karpathy 原始模式：`raw/` 保存来源，`wiki/` 保存整理后的知识，`AGENTS.md` 定义 AI 代理维护规则。

## Entry Points

- [Index](index.md): human and AI navigation entry.
- [Agent Rules](AGENTS.md): rules for reading, updating, and linting the wiki.
- [Maintenance Log](log.md): append-only change log.

## Core Pages

- [LLM Wiki Concept](wiki/concepts/llm-wiki.md)
- [Model Context Protocol](wiki/concepts/model-context-protocol.md)
- [MCP Tools, Resources, and Prompts](wiki/concepts/mcp-tools-resources-prompts.md)
- [MCP Learning Map](wiki/syntheses/mcp-learning-map.md)
- [MCP vs RAG](wiki/questions/mcp-vs-rag.md)
- [Retrieval-Augmented Generation](wiki/concepts/retrieval-augmented-generation.md)
- [RAG Pipeline](wiki/concepts/rag-pipeline.md)
- [Chunking](wiki/concepts/chunking.md)
- [Embedding](wiki/concepts/embedding.md)
- [Vector Database](wiki/concepts/vector-database.md)
- [Hybrid Search](wiki/concepts/hybrid-search.md)
- [Reranker](wiki/concepts/reranker.md)
- [RAG Learning Map](wiki/syntheses/rag-learning-map.md)
- [RAG vs LLM Wiki](wiki/syntheses/rag-vs-llm-wiki.md)
- [Why RAG Still Hallucinates](wiki/questions/why-rag-still-hallucinates.md)

- [SQL Indexing](wiki/concepts/sql-indexing.md)

- [Why MySQL Repeatable Read Is Not Simple Snapshot Isolation](wiki/questions/why-mysql-repeatable-read-is-not-the-same-as-snapshot-isolation.md)
- [Redis Data Types](wiki/concepts/redis-data-types.md)
- [Redis Persistence](wiki/concepts/redis-persistence.md)

- [Kubernetes Namespace](wiki/concepts/kubernetes-namespace.md)
- [Expose OpenFaaS Gateway Locally with kind](wiki/questions/how-kind-exposes-openfaas-gateway-locally.md)

- [Kibana Data View](wiki/concepts/kibana-data-view.md)
- [Prometheus vs Elasticsearch](wiki/syntheses/prometheus-vs-elasticsearch.md)

## Maintenance Rules

- [Agent Rules](AGENTS.md): includes ingest, query, lint, and maintenance workflow.
- [Inbox Rules](raw/inbox/README.md): external exports require user review before formal wiki ingestion.
